$comment: phase 4.7 snapshot — UC-RAE-010 Article 목록 author 분기 ( Spring Data JPA method name derived query paradigm core).
sql_id: ArticleRepository.findAllByAuthorProfileUserName ( method name derived → Embedded Profile.userName 분석)

scenarios.name: happy path — author 기반 article 목록
scenarios.when: ArticleRepository.findAllByAuthorProfileUserName(UserName('jane'), Pageable) → Spring Data JPA method name → SQL: SELECT * FROM article a JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE u.user_name = 'jane' LIMIT/OFFSET

then._note: method name derived paradigm core — Embedded VO Profile.userName 자동 분석 / iBATIS / TypeORM / MyBatis 와는 다른 paradigm ( ORM 추상화 더 깊음)
